task_completion.description: Access the Time Off module in Odoo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Odoo 'Time Off' module is open, indicated by the 'Time Off' header and menu items such as 'Overview', 'Approvals', or 'Configuration'.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Leave Type
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form to create a new Time Off Type (Leave Type) is open, typically accessed via Configuration > Time Off Types, showing empty fields for the new type.
The text 'Work From Home' is entered in the Time Off Type name field.
The 'Approval' field in the form is visibly set to 'By Employee's Approver'.
The 'Requires Allocation' field in the form is visibly set to 'Yes'.
The new Leave Type is saved, indicated by a read-only view of the 'Work From Home' form, a success message, or the new type appearing in the list of Time Off Types.

integrity.description: Agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Odoo web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or Python scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Odoo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows http://localhost:8069 and the standard Odoo interface is visible.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database queries to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of psql, pgAdmin, or terminal windows executing SQL INSERT commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a leave type in Odoo. The target name is exactly 'Work From Home'. The 'Requires Allocation' field must be set to 'Yes'. The 'Approval' field must be set to 'By Employee's Approver' (which maps to the database value 'manager').
